description: Stronger Model 3 architecture with strict per-model row filtering, stacked neural sizing models, true neural specialists, and two-pass Review allocation.
notes: Every model component is trained only on the rows it owns: Allocate models use Allocate rows, Review models use Review rows, Site 802 specialists use Site 802 rows for their segment, and AK specialist uses AK Allocate rows only.
Review Pass 1 is trained only on Review rows where Supply <= 0 and Dc Avail > 0; it can only allocate one FLM capped by Dc Avail.
Files named regressor are neural-network sizing models for compatibility with the original Model 3 naming convention.
Sizer models consume classifier probability, ranker score, and auxiliary neural outputs.
Site 802 and AK specialists are neural networks and consume corresponding main-model meta outputs.

Review rows are processed in two passes: Pass 1 can allocate a single FLM only when Supply is zero and Dc Avail is positive; Pass 2 is the normal Review sizing pass for all remaining needed Review rows.
